title: uraria rufescens
intro: Uraria rufescens, also known as Indian nettle or Katki, is a plant species that belongs to the family Leguminosae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of Uraria rufescens include treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and certain skin conditions, as well as reducing fever and alleviating joint pain. Uraria rufescens can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, powders, and decoctions, which are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine practices.
